name: Tasty Pineapple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream margarine and 2 tablespoons sugar substitute until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well with an electric mixer.
3. Combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a separate bowl.
4. Alternately add the flour mixture and milk to the creamed mixture, beginning and ending with the flour mixture. Beat at low speed after each addition.
5. Cut pineapple into 1-inch pieces and gently fold into the batter.
6. Spoon the batter into a 6-cup Bundt pan or heavy ring mold coated with cooking spray.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 to 50 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Combine pineapple juice and remaining 1 tablespoon sugar substitute in a separate bowl, stirring until the sugar substitute dissolves. Pour the juice over the cake while it is still hot from the oven and let cool completely on a wire rack.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE; CAL: 129; CHO: 46; CAR: 17gm; PRO: 3gm; FAT: 5gm; SOD: 341.
